languages.text: {n}Напускное спокойствие мгновенно слетает с Ювенны, и ее красивые черты искажаются злобой.{/n} "Мой отец — полоумный еретик и безумец, из-за которого гнев Священных Ордосов пал на всю династию. Если я, единственная законная наследница, не исправлю его ошибки, то этого не сделает никто! Но вместо меня он привечает безродную выскочку Войгтвир, которая потакает ему в его грехах. Я положу этому конец".

{n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."
languages.original_text: {n}Напускное спокойствие мгновенно слетает с Ювенны, и ее красивые черты искажаются злобой.{/n} "Мой отец — полоумный еретик и безумец, из-за которого гнев Священных Ордосов пал на всю династию. Если я, единственная законная наследница, не исправлю его ошибки, то этого не сделает никто! Но вместо меня он привечает безродную выскочку Войгтвир, которая потакает ему в его грехах. Я положу этому конец".

If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."

languages.text: {n}La calma fingida desaparece al instante del rostro de Juvenna y sus hermosas facciones se retuercen de furia.{/n} «Mi padre es un imbécil herético y perturbado que ha atraído la ira de los Santos Ordos contra toda la dinastía. ¡Si yo, como legítima heredera, no rectifico este error, nadie lo hará! Pero en lugar de aceptarme, eligió a esa plebeya advenediza de Voigtvir, que consiente su maldad. Pondré fin a esto».
languages.original_text: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}La calma fingida desaparece al instante del rostro de Juvenna y sus hermosas facciones se retuercen de furia.{/n} «Mi padre es un imbécil herético y perturbado que ha atraído la ira de los Santos Ordos contra toda la dinastía. ¡Si yo, como legítima heredera, no rectifico este error, nadie lo hará! Pero en lugar de aceptarme, eligió a esa plebeya advenediza de Voigtvir, que consiente su maldad. Pondré fin a esto».

languages.text: {n}尤文娜脸上那刻意维持的平静瞬间荡然无存，美丽的五官因愤怒而扭曲。{/n}“我父亲是个愚蠢的异端，是个疯子，他把整个王朝都拖入了审判庭的怒火之中。若我这唯一的合法继承人不去纠正他的过错，还有谁会去！可他不接纳我也就罢了，偏偏选了那个出身低贱的暴发户维特威尔——一个只会纵容他继续作恶的人。我要亲手了结这一切。”
languages.original_text: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜脸上那刻意维持的平静瞬间荡然无存，美丽的五官因愤怒而扭曲。{/n}“我父亲是个愚蠢的异端，是个疯子，他把整个王朝都拖入了审判庭的怒火之中。若我这唯一的合法继承人不去纠正他的过错，还有谁会去！可他不接纳我也就罢了，偏偏选了那个出身低贱的暴发户维特威尔——一个只会纵容他继续作恶的人。我要亲手了结这一切。”

languages.text: {n}Le calme feint affiché par Juvenna jusqu'à présent disparaît subitement, et ses traits délicats se déforment sous l'effet de la rage.{/n} « Mon père est un hérétique demeuré et un aliéné qui a attiré les foudres du Saint Ordo sur l'ensemble de la dynastie. En tant que seule héritière légitime de la dynastie, je me dois de réparer ses erreurs, ou personne ne le fera ! Mais au lieu de se rallier à moi, il préfère ce roturier arriviste de Voigtvir, qui le laisse se vautrer allègrement dans son vice. Je me fais fort d'y mettre un terme. »
languages.original_text: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le calme feint affiché par Juvenna jusqu'à présent disparaît subitement, et ses traits délicats se déforment sous l'effet de la rage.{/n} « Mon père est un hérétique demeuré et un aliéné qui a attiré les foudres du Saint Ordo sur l'ensemble de la dynastie. En tant que seule héritière légitime de la dynastie, je me dois de réparer ses erreurs, ou personne ne le fera ! Mais au lieu de se rallier à moi, il préfère ce roturier arriviste de Voigtvir, qui le laisse se vautrer allègrement dans son vice. Je me fais fort d'y mettre un terme. »

languages.text: {n}Yapmacık sakinlik, Juvenna'nın yüzünden anında buharlaşıyor. Güzel hatları öfkeyle çarpılıyor.{/n} "Babam, Kutsal Nizamların gazabını tüm hanedanlığın üzerine çeken yarım akıllı bir kâfir ve deli. Tek meşru vâris olarak onun hatasını düzeltmezsem bunu kimse yapmayacak! Fakat beni kucaklamak yerine onun kötülüklerine göz yuman o soysuz türedi Voigtvir'i seçiyor. Buna bir son vereceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yapmacık sakinlik, Juvenna'nın yüzünden anında buharlaşıyor. Güzel hatları öfkeyle çarpılıyor.{/n} "Babam, Kutsal Nizamların gazabını tüm hanedanlığın üzerine çeken yarım akıllı bir kâfir ve deli. Tek meşru vâris olarak onun hatasını düzeltmezsem bunu kimse yapmayacak! Fakat beni kucaklamak yerine onun kötülüklerine göz yuman o soysuz türedi Voigtvir'i seçiyor. Buna bir son vereceğim."

languages.text: {n}Die aufgesetzte Ruhe verschwindet sofort aus Juvennas schönem Gesicht und weicht offenem Zorn.{/n} "Mein Vater ist ein dummdreister Ketzer und Wahnsinniger, der den Zorn der Heiligen Ordos über die gesamte Dynastie gebracht hat. Wenn ich, seine einzige rechtmäßige Erbin, seine Fehler nicht wiedergutmache, wird es niemand tun! Aber anstatt mich in seine Arme zu schließen, gibt er dieser emporgekommenen Krähe Voigtvir den Vorzug, die ihn in seinem Irrsinn unterstützt. Dem werde ich ein Ende machen."
languages.original_text: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die aufgesetzte Ruhe verschwindet sofort aus Juvennas schönem Gesicht und weicht offenem Zorn.{/n} "Mein Vater ist ein dummdreister Ketzer und Wahnsinniger, der den Zorn der Heiligen Ordos über die gesamte Dynastie gebracht hat. Wenn ich, seine einzige rechtmäßige Erbin, seine Fehler nicht wiedergutmache, wird es niemand tun! Aber anstatt mich in seine Arme zu schließen, gibt er dieser emporgekommenen Krähe Voigtvir den Vorzug, die ihn in seinem Irrsinn unterstützt. Dem werde ich ein Ende machen."

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは怒りに満ちた表情を浮かべ、その美しさを失った。{/n} 「父は愚かな異端者であり、聖なる秩序の怒りを王朝全体に落とした狂人だ。正当な唯一の相続人である私が父の過ちを正さないならば、誰も正さないだろう。しかし、私を迎え入れるのではなく、父は下卑た野郎ヴォイトヴィルを選んだ。彼は父の悪行を助長している。私はこれを終わらせる。」
languages.original_text: {n}The affected calm instantly evaporates from Juvenna's face, and her beautiful features twist in rage.{/n} "My father is a half-witted heretic and a madman who has brought the wrath of the Holy Ordos down upon the entire dynasty. If I, the only legitimate heir, do not right his wrong, no one will! But instead of embracing me, he chooses that baseborn upstart Voigtvir, who indulges him in his wickedness. I will put an end to it."
